items.title: WILOW - Paris
items.subtitle: Professional training
items.text: webMethods 10.x training: Integration Server & Designer, installation (shell scripts & Command Central), IS administration, service development (File Polling, REST API).

items.title: IONIS STM - France
items.subtitle: Work-study student
items.text: MSc (Master of Science) AI & Management — Expert in Computer Engineering

items.title: IAI - Cameroon
items.subtitle: Student
items.text: Software Engineering degree > Analysis and design of information systems

items.title: DATA2INNOV
items.subtitle: Fullstack Software Engineer (Lead / Tech Lead)
items.text: Fullstack development (Next.js / FastAPI) of patient & doctor healthcare apps compliant with FHIR/HL7. Collection and interpretation of physiological data from connected devices (EmotiBit-ESP32, Withings, Bangle.js), real-time pipelines (Logstash, WebSockets, ELK), Flutter mobile PoC (BLE/WiFi). Continuous integration & delivery (GitLab CI, Docker, Ansible). Technical mentoring of teams in Tunisia.

items.title: YSO Conseils / KAZAC — Smart Data Pay
items.subtitle: Fullstack Web, AI & Tech Lead Engineer
items.text: Built a RAG chatbot (Next.js, OpenAI, Ollama, LiteLLM, LangChain) — an intelligent assistant for payroll, labour law and collective agreements in France. Fullstack Laravel development (Filament, Livewire), SAAS automation (Make/N8N), CI/CD on Azure.

items.title: MAMALPRO
items.subtitle: Web & DevOps Developer
items.text: Covid-19 testing web platform — official platform for AFCON Total Energies 2021 Cameroon, for the Regional Public Health Delegation of Littoral / MINSANTE.

items.title: Sylen-IT Services
items.subtitle: Angular / TypeScript Developer
items.text: API integration and UI redesign for the Coface project (BPCE Group), fully remote. Document search built around Elasticsearch. Stack: Angular, Laravel, RxJS.

items.title: SCB Cameroon (Attijariwafa Bank Group)
items.subtitle: Programmer Analyst - Project Lead (AMOE)
items.text: Digital transformation of a top-3 Cameroonian bank: secure REST APIs (JWT), KONG reverse proxy, LDAP + RBAC authentication against the AD, intranet portal for business apps, automated PDF account-statement delivery, Argo CD deployment on Kubernetes.

items.title: KOREE
items.subtitle: Lead Backend Developer (PHP/Laravel) & Mobile (Flutter)
items.text: Design and development of a customer loyalty platform (top-3 Fintech startup in Central Africa): secure RESTful APIs (JWT), cloud integrations (AWS, GCP, Stripe), GitLab + Ansible CI/CD, vulnerability scanning (Snyk).

items.title: LAB2VIEW
items.subtitle: Fullstack Developer Laravel / Vue.js / Electron.js
items.text: Cross-platform desktop app (Electron.js) for stock and point-of-sale management, powered by a RESTful API: automatic updates and release publishing, multi-tenant architecture and SAAS version, AWS EC2 / Plesk deployment.

items.title: SAS Inimov
items.subtitle: Fullstack Developer Laravel / Ionic
items.text: Development of a delivery e-commerce platform and a mobile loyalty application.

items.title: MEFOR SHOP
items.subtitle: Consultant
items.text: Technical guidance and advisory to the lead developer, plus support with the deployment / hosting of the MEFOR SHOP e-commerce platform (online store in Cameroon).

items.title: MCS IT
items.subtitle: Fullstack Developer Laravel / Angular / Vue.js
items.text: Development of an e-commerce platform for parcel and meal delivery (Design Thinking, OOP, clean code): Angular app with Social Auth, courier mobile app (Flutter), POS backoffice, Google Maps/Places & Firebase integrations, Kubernetes clusters on GCP, GitLab + Laravel Envoy / Ansible CI/CD.
